Document:
# Deconversion
When mounting an effort to thwart the [color=#4cabb3]Cosmic Cult[/color], there are several methods the crew might employ to ensure their survival and safety. One of these methods is [color=Yellow]Deconversion[/color].
Unfortunately deconverting a cosmic cultist is [color=Red]impossible[/color] with the tools available to the crew. If you were to capture a cultist, the best decision is to deliver them to CentComm in handcuffs, where they can be "processed" appropriately.
## Cosmic Servants
However, the cultists themselves aren't the only threat: any crewmember without a [color=Yellow]mind shield implant[/color] can be brainwashed by the cult and forced to do their bidding.
Locating brainwashed crewmembers is rather simple, as their eyes glow with unnatural energy. Be careful, though, as this glow is easily concealed by clothing.
If a brainwashed crewmember is discovered, simply installing a [color=Yellow]mind shield implant[/color] will free them from the cult's influence. This, however, will not suffice for actual cultists – malign power within them is strong enough to fry the implant's circuitry, rendering it useless.
